title: muhlenbergia mexicana var. commutata
intro: Muhlenbergia mexicana var. commutata, also known as Mexican Muhly Grass, is a type of grass native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal medicine, where its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Muhlenbergia mexicana var. commutata include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
